name: Sweet Bishop's Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the flour, salt, sugar, and butter until crumbly.
2. Measure and set aside 3/4 cup of the mixture.
3. To the remainder, add the baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, egg, and buttermilk. Beat until smooth.
4. Spread the batter in a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 to 60 minutes or until a wooden pick comes out clean.
6. Cool for 10 minutes.
7. Cut into 9 pieces and serve warm.
